title: Keyword Research Input
description: Input schema for the Keyword Research Actor.

keywords.title: Seed Keywords
keywords.description: List of seed keywords to research. Google Suggest will be called for each keyword and its question-pattern variants.

language.title: Language / Locale
language.description: Language code passed to Google Suggest (hl parameter). Default is Japanese.

topN.title: Top N keywords to output
topN.description: Number of top-scored keywords to include in the dataset output.

requestDelaySeconds.title: Delay between requests (seconds)
requestDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to wait between Google Suggest API calls to avoid rate limiting.

maxQuestionPatterns.title: Max question-pattern variants per seed
maxQuestionPatterns.description: Number of Japanese question suffixes to append to each seed keyword (max 12).
